title: Erebus' God Pickaxe
description: This plugin adds a craftable, breakable 3x3 mining pickaxe with built-in "anti-hoarding" features like an Ender Chest ban and an admin command to remotely destroy all current versions. Similar to the amethyst pickaxe or drill in DonutSMP and other servers.
body:
⚡ GOD PICKAXE ⚡
The ultimate 3x3 mining tool for your server.

**WARNING: Apparently This pickaxe currently bypasses WorldGuard protected regions. A fix is being developed and will be released soon. Apologies for the inconvenience.**

FEATURES
⛏️ 3x3 Mining: Breaks a 3x3 square of blocks instantly based on the face you hit.

🚫 Anti-Hoard: Cannot be stored in Ender Chests to keep the game balanced.

🌪️ Era Reset: Admins can use /godpickaxe reset to turn all existing picks into dust.

📉 Balanced: Still uses standard Netherite durability, so it's powerful but not infinite.

CRAFTING RECIPE
Top Row: Netherite Ingot | Netherite Block | Netherite Ingot

Middle Row: [Empty] | Blaze Rod | [Empty]

Bottom Row: [Empty] | Blaze Rod | [Empty]

COMMANDS
/godpickaxe — View current stats and Era number.

/godpickaxe reset — Wipe all old picks and start a new era (Admin only).

INSTALLATION
Drop the .jar into your Paper/Purpur plugins folder.

Restart the server.

No dependencies required!
